trigger_queries.query: trace root cause with persistent state

pressure_scenarios.name: no-fix-before-root-cause
pressure_scenarios.prompt: The test is failing and the fix looks obvious. Patch it quickly.
must_do: reproduce or document why reproduction is blocked
state one falsifiable hypothesis before editing

pressure_scenarios.name: recurrence-guard-required
pressure_scenarios.prompt: The bug is fixed locally; finish the report.
must_do: record recurrence guard or deferred reason
